name: bathroom-remodeling-marketing-kit
description: Compliance-moated marketing kit for bathroom remodeling contractors. 7 gates: NRS 624 license scope, EPA RRP (40 CFR Part 745), Clark County permit, ADA scope accuracy, mold/moisture boundary, structural/PE disclosure, Magnuson-Moss/FTC/TCPA.
complianceMoats: NRS 624 B-2 license scope + C-1/C-2 sub disclosure gate
EPA RRP 40 CFR Part 745 — pre-1978 home Firm Cert + CR gate
Clark County permit gate — 'no permit needed' permanently blocked
ADA Title III scope accuracy — 'ADA compliant' blocked for residential; ANSI A117.1 aging-in-place required
IICRC S520 mold/moisture scope boundary gate
NRS 625 structural/load-bearing wall PE disclosure gate
Magnuson-Moss §104 warranty terms + FTC 2023 + TCPA PEWC gate
targetMarket: bathroom remodeling contractors, design-build firms, kitchen & bath showrooms, insurance restoration contractors
author: Max (10bf10max@gmail.com)
